name: ai-price-radar
description: AI 模型价格雷达 - 实时追踪 AI 模型价格、优惠和性价比

scripts.dev: concurrently --names web,worker -c blue,green "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:worker"
scripts.build: npm run build:core && npm run build:web
scripts.typecheck: npm -w @pricing/core run typecheck ; npm -w web run typecheck ; npm -w worker run typecheck
scripts.test: npm -w @pricing/core run test && npm -w web run test 2>/dev/null; true
